description_long: This kiosk features a large, rounded, dome-like structure with four thick, curved pillars supporting the roof at each corner. The main entrance is a wide, open archway at the front, allowing easy access for people to walk inside. The exterior is predominantly smooth and white, with a printed sign above the entrance displaying colorful graphics and text. The roof is continuous and seamless, with a gentle arch and no visible seams or joints, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The interior appears spacious and open, with no visible windows or additional doors. The kiosk is set on a flat, dark platform, and a human figure nearby provides a sense of scale.
description: A large, white, dome-shaped kiosk with four curved pillars and a wide open archway entrance, featuring a colorful printed sign above the entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide open archway entrance, colorful signage above the entry, and a human figure for scale.
description_view_1: Rear view with the back archway visible, no signage or human figure, and the smooth, continuous dome roof.
description_view_2: Side view showing the curved profile of the dome and the open archway, with no signage visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 2, highlighting the symmetry and open archway design.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign above entrance with colorful graphics and text
attribute_door_configuration: single open archway at front and rear
attribute_roof_design: domed, seamless, smooth white roof with no visible overhangs or decorative elements
